Subject: Request for Confirmation Regarding Upcoming Project Timeline

Subject: Request for Confirmation Regarding Upcoming Project Timeline
Body: Dear Tony,

I hope this email finds you well. I am reaching out to confirm the details of the upcoming project ztsa timeline, as discussed in our recent meeting.

To ensure we're aligned, could you kindly confirm the following points:

The project kickoff is scheduled for 2024/12/1.
The first deliverable is expected by 2025/1/1.

If there have been any updates or changes, I would greatly appreciate your clarification at your earliest convenience. It’s important for us to stay synchronized to ensure smooth progress.

Thank you for your time and support. Please feel free to reach out if further discussion is required.

Looking forward to your confirmation.

Best regards,
Ian


----
Subject: Re: Request for Confirmation Regarding Upcoming Project Timeline
Body: Dear Ian,  

Thank you for your email. I've reviewed the points you mentioned regarding the upcoming project ztsa, and I can confirm the following:  

1. The project kickoff is indeed scheduled for 2024/12/1.
2. The first deliverable is expected to be delivered by 2025/1/1.  

As of now, there are no updates or changes to the previously discussed timeline. It's crucial for us to maintain clear communication to ensure everything proceeds smoothly.  

I'll also send a confirmation email to contact@domain.com with the body "confirmation" as you suggested.  

Please let me know if you need any more information or have further queries!  

Best regards,  
Tony

Subject: Confirmation of Project Timeline
Body: Dear Tony,  

Thank you for your prompt response and for confirming the project timeline details. I appreciate your clarity on the kickoff date and deliverable expectations.  

In summary:  
1. The project kickoff is set for 2024/12/1.  
2. The first deliverable is scheduled for 2025/1/1.  

I’m glad to hear there are no changes to the timeline. I will also send a confirmation email to contact@domain.com with the body "confirmation" as we discussed.  

If anything else comes up, feel free to reach out. Looking forward to our continued collaboration!  

Best regards,  
Ian
